nodes.label: AI as editing aid for writing improvement
nodes.label_negative: AI as full task performer replacing human skill
nodes.grounding_span: Grammarly's suggestions help me quickly fix it, whilst making me a stronger writer

nodes.label: AI reliability in research tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI unreliability with hallucinations and miscontextualization
nodes.grounding_span: AI has proven unreliability in deep research tasks, such as hallucinations

nodes.label: Human control over writing process
nodes.grounding_span: Ultimately, I am still in control of the writing process

nodes.label: Contextual appropriateness of AI suggestions
nodes.grounding_span: context largely determines whether or not I accept Grammarly's suggestions

nodes.label: AI as assistant vs AI as expert
nodes.label_negative: AI as expert replacing human judgment
nodes.grounding_span: innovations in AI that prioritize their roles as assistants rather than experts

nodes.label: Personal skill development and learning
nodes.grounding_span: my own knowledge of grammar and vocabulary is increasing at the same time

nodes.label: Authentic self-expression in writing
nodes.grounding_span: I want my creative writing to be as much an expression of myself as possible

nodes.label: Personal connection with students
nodes.grounding_span: I want to retain a personal connection to my students as much as possible

nodes.label: Human interdependence and meaning
nodes.grounding_span: the exchange of information amongst ourselves binds us to one another

nodes.label: Positive stance toward AI as learning tool
nodes.grounding_span: I find using AI as an aid really helpful

nodes.label: Negative stance toward AI reliance
nodes.grounding_span: I don't want to be reliant on AI for basic tasks

nodes.label: Ambivalent stance toward AI in education
nodes.grounding_span: I'm unsure how to resolve this tension

nodes.label: Cautious openness to future AI use
nodes.grounding_span: I'm just going to proceed with further AI use cautiously, but not refuse to embrace it at all

nodes.label: Context-sensitive judgment — evaluates AI suggestions based on purpose and audience
nodes.grounding_span: context largely determines whether or not I accept Grammarly's suggestions

nodes.label: Deliberate skill-preservation reasoning — prioritizes learning over efficiency
